text_original: it's a good time if you have thr time to waste
text_zh: 如果你有时间可以挥霍，那这会是一段美好的时光。
reply_original: Wow, thank you for the 4-star review! We are thrilled to be your favorite way to "waste" some time. Whether you are looking for deep stories or just a quick laugh, our characters are always here to keep you company. If you ever have ideas to make the app even better, feel free to reach out at support@fantachat.ai. Have fun!
reply_zh: 哇，感谢您的四星好评！我们很高兴能成为您最喜欢的“消磨”时间的方式。无论您是在寻找深度的故事，还是只想开怀大笑，我们的角色都会一直陪伴着您。如果您有任何能让应用变得更好的建议，欢迎随时通过 support@fantachat.ai 与我们联系。祝您玩得开心！
